footer.created_for: Created for Diploma Project • Iterative development model

hero.title: The cultural pulse of your city, all in one place.
hero.subtitle: Discover, plan and experience the most exciting events – from intimate concerts to large-scale festivals. Your personalized guide to culture.
hero.handpicked: Handpicked highlights from the programme you don't want to miss.
hero.no_events: No active events at the moment.

events.title: All Events

events.filters_subtitle: Sort the list by city, category and date.

events.no_results: No events found matching these criteria.

events.error_not_logged: You must be logged in to manage events.

location.error_not_supported: Geolocation is not supported by this browser.

profile_settings.title: Profile and Settings
profile_settings.email_password_note: Email and password change options are only shown on request. Each change has its own confirmation button.
profile_settings.password_reset_note: We will send a password reset link to your email address.
profile_settings.categories_hint: Categories are optional. You can leave this field empty.
profile_settings.pwd_reset_success: A password reset link has been sent to your email.
profile_settings.email_change_prompt: Please enter a new email address.
profile_settings.email_change_success: Request sent. Please check your new email for confirmation.

favorites.title: Favorites
favorites.subtitle: The events you have liked.

favorites.settings_subtitle: Review your profile, change your name, email, password and preferences.
favorites.reason_label: Why should you receive this role?

auth.login_subtitle: Log in to your account to use all features.
auth.register_subtitle: Create a new account and unlock personalization, likes and notifications.
auth.recovery_subtitle: Enter your new password and confirm it to complete the recovery.
auth.success_register_email: Registration successful. Check your email for confirmation if necessary.
auth.success_recovery_sent: We sent a password recovery link to this email.

admin.users_subtitle: Here you can manage the rights of users with the 'Special User' role.
admin.downgrade_warning_title: Attention: This operation is irreversible through this interface.
admin.downgrade_warning_desc: The user will lose their rights to create and manage events immediately.
admin.downgrade_instruction: To confirm that you want to downgrade **{{name}}**, please type their email (**{{email}}**) below:
admin.error_downgrade: An error occurred while downgrading the user.

admin_msg.other_approval: Approval of another user (Standard administrative flow) ✅
admin_msg.mismatch_error: Mismatch: You are not the administrator of this account ❌

location.prompt_text: If you allow location, we will show closer and recommended events based on your region in Bulgaria.
location.info_no_region: Location allowed, but we couldn't determine the region.
location.warning_declined: Without location access, we'll show recommendations based on your profile or general ones.
